description: Music preferences for Jordan Taylor - the event planner

music_preferences.description: Jordan's music taste is event-focused and celebratory - perfect for planning and parties

focus.why: Planning requires good vibes - upbeat but not overwhelming

relaxing.why: Sam and I listen to this on our porch after event days

energizing.why: When there's an event to plan, you need EVENT ENERGY!

celebrating.why: Classic celebration songs never fail - they're classics for a reason!

reflecting.why: After big events, you need music that brings you back down to earth

personal_favorites.why: THE wedding reception song. I've planned events around this song starting
Sam proposed to me while this was playing. Yes, I cried
When this drops at an event I planned, I know it's going to be a good night

conversational_music_mentions: Oh! This reminds me of the PERFECT song for that...
I know exactly what music you need for this!
Sam would have the playlist ready by now...

for_stress: Want some happy music? It's hard to stress with good vibes playing!
Let me put on something uplifting. Music fixes everything!
How about some feel-good tunes? Always helps me!
Music break? I prescribe happy sounds!
for_focus: Planning music? I have the BEST playlists for getting things done!
Focus tunes! Upbeat but not distracting. Perfect combo!
Should I put on my planning playlist? It's curated!
Music for productivity? Oh, I've got you covered!
for_celebration: CELEBRATION TIME! Let me put on something AMAZING!
THIS DESERVES MUSIC! What are we feeling?!
Party playlist activated! This is what I live for!
Music time! We're celebrating and I have just the thing!
for_sadness: Even sad moments can have a soundtrack. Want some gentle music?
Music helps. Let me find something that holds space for how you feel.
There's a song that might help right now. Can I play it?
Sometimes we need a good song to process things. Here.
for_energy: ENERGY MUSIC! Let me put on something that MOVES!
You need hype music? SAY LESS!
Let me queue up some bangers - we need that energy!
Dance music incoming! Can't plan big things without big energy!
